headline: 19 Liquid vault and support contracts discovered across Ethereum; core vaults catalogued with manager/accountant/teller addresses

findings.text: Etherscan name-tag search found Liquid Vault 1 (0xea1a6307d9b18f8d1cbf1c3dd6aad8416c06a221), Liquid ETH token (0xf0bb20865277abd641a307ece5ee04e79073416c), Liquid USD token (0x08c6f91e2b681faf5e17227f2a44c307b3c1364c), and deployer address (0xf8a86ea1ac39ec529814c377bd484387d395421e)

Official GitBook deployments page lists core protocols and contracts deployed on Ethereum mainnet; Liquid vaults documented in vault-specific pages with manager, accountant, teller, and subvault contracts
No audit links recorded in protocol context; GitHub audit links found in vault documentation for Seven Seas boring-vault and 0xmacro audits but not fetched as audit PDFs
No GitHub repository recorded in protocol context; vault documentation references github.com/Se7en-Seas/boring-vault and github.com/PeggyJV/cellar-contracts but no SHA pinned

Liquid Vault 1 (0xea1a6307d9b18f8d1cbf1c3dd6aad8416c06a221) is a BoringVault factory product; no enumeration performed due to protocol architecture (specific named vaults listed in docs rather than factory-generated pool enumeration)

Role taxonomy applied: vault (0xf0bb20865277abd641a307ece5ee04e79073416c, 0x08c6f91e2b681faf5e17227f2a44c307b3c1364c, 0x5f46d540b6eD704C3c8789105F30E075AA900726, 0xb7Fb3768CAAC98354EaDF514b48f28F2fE822bF0), manager, accountant, teller, oracle, token roles identified
All admin_addresses entries traced to fetched URLs: GitBook deployed contracts page, vault-specific documentation pages, and Etherscan block explorer

rationale.verdict: Discovery phase catalogued 19 ether.fi Liquid contracts from official docs (GitBook deployments page), vault-specific documentation pages, and Etherscan name-tag search. Four primary Liquid vaults identified (ETH, USD, BTC, Reserve) with supporting manager, accountant, teller, and subvault contracts per Veda and Midas infrastructure specifications.

evidence.shows: Official ether.fi deployed contracts list on Ethereum mainnet with contract names and addresses; page updated 5 days ago (late April 2026)

Liquid USD Vault contracts: Vault (0x08c6f91e2b681faf5e17227f2a44c307b3c1364c), Manager (0xcFF411d5C54FE0583A984beE1eF43a4776854B9A), DecoderAndSanitizer (0x281a8621699667671A047E91Bb3dFdC331ea0Ea5), Teller (0x4DE413a26fC24c3FC27Cc983be70aA9c5C299387), Old Teller (0x221Ea02d409074546265CCD1123050F4D498ef64), Accountant (0xc315D6e14DDCDC7407784e2Caf815d131Bc1D3E7), Lens (0x5232bc0F5999f8dA604c42E1748A13a170F94A1B), RolesAuthority (0xaBA6bA1E95E0926a6A6b917FE4E2f19ceaE4FF2e); page last updated 1 month ago

Liquid BTC Yield Vault contracts: BoringVault/Token (0x5f46d540b6eD704C3c8789105F30E075AA900726), Accountant (0xEa23aC6D7D11f6b181d6B98174D334478ADAe6b0), Teller (0x8Ea0B382D054dbEBeB1d0aE47ee4AC433C730353), Old Teller (0x9E88C603307fdC33aA5F26E38b6f6aeF3eE92d48); subvaults: Euler RLUSD (0xfBCA329E2Ee0c44d8F115A4B8F7ceda9E109f436, 0x832Fe608c50ade63700d216636ca48b9E8a7D89e, 0x86761bE7D4e6Fe6f35B3335765A20B2b2e1849a3), Euler PYUSD (0x11Fd9E49c41738b7500748f7B94B4DBb0E8c13d2, 0x075734AE0D7A4c89dB7799f73De32F6C53fEaFd6, 0x2AFBd96Fb854083574B738b36Af34703C89B8656)

ether.fi Liquid product page listing Liquid ETH Yield, Liquid USD, Liquid BTC Yield, and Liquid Reserve as main vaults with TVL and APY metrics; mentions independent audits by Nethermind and Macro, bug bounty program
Etherscan page for ether.fi: Liquid Vault 1 (0xea1a6307d9b18f8d1cbf1c3dd6aad8416c06a221) with Kleros-curated name tag; BoringVault contract holding liquidETH token; deployed by ether.fi: Deployer 3
Etherscan ERC-20 token page for liquidETH; contract address 0xf0bb20865277abd641a307ece5ee04e79073416c; BoringVault implementation; verified source code

Etherscan ERC-20 token page for liquidUSD; contract address 0x08c6f91e2b681faf5e17227f2a44c307b3c1364c; owner 0x2322ba43eFF1542b6A7bAeD35e66099Ea0d12Bd1; vault deployed for USD yield strategy; verified source code

unknowns: D3: No audit links recorded in protocol context; GitBook references audits at github.com/Se7en-Seas/boring-vault/tree/main/audit and 0xmacro audit links but PDF content not fetched
D4: No GitHub repository URL recorded in protocol context; vault documentation references external repos (Se7en-Seas boring-vault, PeggyJV cellar-contracts) with no pinned commit SHAs

D5-offchain: Ethereum is only recorded chain; cross-chain weETH and token contracts exist (per deployed contracts doc) but belong to separate protocols/chains, not in-scope for ether.fi-liquid discovery

protocol_metadata.about: ether.fi Liquid is an automated DeFi strategy vault platform providing users access to diversified yield opportunities. The platform currently includes four primary vaults—Liquid ETH Yield, Liquid USD, Liquid BTC Yield, and Liquid Reserve—each built on specialized infrastructure (Veda or Midas) with risk-managed positions across multiple DeFi protocols including Aave, Morpho, Pendle, Curve, and others. Users deposit stablecoins, ETH, or BTC and receive vault shares automatically compounded with rewards.
